The file has been successfully updated with all 4 fixes applied. Here's a summary of what was done:

### Fix 1 — `<Page>` must contain `<PageBreadcrumb>` (line 113)
- **Added** `PageBreadcrumb` to the imports from `@patternfly/react-core` (line 24)
- **Added** `<PageBreadcrumb />` as a child of `<Page>` (line 115)

### Fix 2 — `MastheadBrand` signature changed from anchor to div (line 16)
- **No code change needed.** The current usage of `<MastheadBrand>` (line 61) wraps a `<Brand>` child and doesn't use any anchor-specific props (`href`, `target`, etc.), so it's already compatible with the new div-based interface.

### Fix 3 — `Nav` now also omits `onToggle` (line 20)
- **No code change needed.** The current `<Nav>` usage (line 83) doesn't use `onToggle`, so the signature change has no impact.

### Fix 4 — `skipToContent` type changed from `ReactElement` to `ReactElement<any>` (line 113)
- **No code change needed.** `ReactElement` without a type parameter defaults to `ReactElement<any>` in TypeScript, so the `PageSkipToContent` variable is already type-compatible.
